headline: Piper Sandler Upgrades Arthur J. Gallagher to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $276
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Paul Newsome   upgrades Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) from Neutral to Overweight and raises the price target from $225 to $276.
